-->

use_scatter_gate <- FALSE 
use_PC_gate <- FALSE
runs_to_plot <- c(\Run 10\)

tdf <- Object_Table[Source %in% runs_to_plot]

if (use_PC_gate) {
  tdf <- tdf[Gated_PC == TRUE]
}

if (use_scatter_gate) {
  tdf <- tdf[in_gate == TRUE]
}

# Define measures and conditions
measures <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, \DAPI.Mean.Intensity\, \DAPI.Integrated.Intensity\, \MPO.Mean.Intensity\)
conditions_to_plot <- c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only\n+ PMA\n4 Hours\)  # \Cells Only\ And \+ PMA\ 

# Filter and prepare data
df <- tdf[Condition %in% conditions_to_plot]

# Convert Column to factor with labels
df[, Condition := factor(Condition, levels = c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only\n+ PMA\n4 Hours\),
                      labels = c(\Cells Only\, \+ PMA\))]

# Reshape data from wide to long format
df_long <- melt(df, 
                id.vars = c(\Condition\),
                measure.vars = measures,
                variable.name = \Measure\,
                value.name = \Value\)

# Create cleaner measure labels
df_long[, Measure := factor(Measure, 
                            levels = measures
                            )]

# Scale it
df_long[, Value := Value / max(Value, na.rm = TRUE), by = Measure]

# Define colors for conditions (not datasets)
condition_colors <- c(
  \Cells Only\ = \aquamarine3\,
  \+ PMA\ = \orangered2\
)

plot_title <- \Distribution of Measures by Condition\

# Create violin plot
p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Measure, y = Value, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6, scale = \width\, position = position_dodge(width = 0.92)) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = \point\, size = 1.5, color = \black\,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = \\,
    y = \Value\,
    fill = \Condition\,
    title = plot_title
  )

ggsave(\violin-plot-run10.png\, plot = p, width = 10, height = 6)
print(p)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin -->

```r
```r
use_scatter_gate <- FALSE 
use_PC_gate <- FALSE
runs_to_plot <- c(\Run 10\)

tdf <- Object_Table[Source %in% runs_to_plot]

if (use_PC_gate) {
  tdf <- tdf[Gated_PC == TRUE]
}

if (use_scatter_gate) {
  tdf <- tdf[in_gate == TRUE]
}

# Define measures and conditions
measures <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, \DAPI.Mean.Intensity\, \DAPI.Integrated.Intensity\, \MPO.Mean.Intensity\)
conditions_to_plot <- c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only\n+ PMA\n4 Hours\)  # \Cells Only\ And \+ PMA\ 

# Filter and prepare data
df <- tdf[Condition %in% conditions_to_plot]

# Convert Column to factor with labels
df[, Condition := factor(Condition, levels = c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only\n+ PMA\n4 Hours\),
                      labels = c(\Cells Only\, \+ PMA\))]

# Reshape data from wide to long format
df_long <- melt(df, 
                id.vars = c(\Condition\),
                measure.vars = measures,
                variable.name = \Measure\,
                value.name = \Value\)

# Create cleaner measure labels
df_long[, Measure := factor(Measure, 
                            levels = measures
                            )]

# Scale it
df_long[, Value := Value / max(Value, na.rm = TRUE), by = Measure]

# Define colors for conditions (not datasets)
condition_colors <- c(
  \Cells Only\ = \aquamarine3\,
  \+ PMA\ = \orangered2\
)

plot_title <- \Distribution of Measures by Condition\

# Create violin plot
p <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = Measure, y = Value, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, alpha = 0.6, scale = \width\, position = position_dodge(width = 0.92)) +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = \point\, size = 1.5, color = \black\,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = condition_colors) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = \\,
    y = \Value\,
    fill = \Condition\,
    title = plot_title
  )

ggsave(\violin-plot-run10.png\, plot = p, width = 10, height = 6)
print(p)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->

ZWlnaHQgPSA0KVxucGxvdChwKVxuXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

p <- ggplot(Object_Table[Condition %in% c(\Cells Only No Stain + PMA\,\Cells Only + PMA\,\Cells Only\) & Source == \Run 9\],
       aes(x = CitH3.Integrated.Intensity, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.4,
                 position = \identity\,
                 bins = 100) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(\Cells Only No Stain + PMA\=\red\, \Cells Only + PMA\=\blue\, \Cells Only\=\green\)) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x = \CitH3 Integrated Intensity (log10)\) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(\Run9_histo-CitH3.Intgr.I-1.png\, plot = p, width = 7, height = 4)
plot(p)




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
p <- ggplot(Object_Table[Condition %in% c(\Cells Only No Stain + PMA\,\Cells Only + PMA\,\Cells Only\) & Source == \Run 9\],
       aes(x = CitH3.Integrated.Intensity, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_histogram(alpha = 0.4,
                 position = \identity\,
                 bins = 100) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(\Cells Only No Stain + PMA\=\red\, \Cells Only + PMA\=\blue\, \Cells Only\=\green\)) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x = \CitH3 Integrated Intensity (log10)\) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(\Run9_histo-CitH3.Intgr.I-1.png\, plot = p, width = 7, height = 4)
plot(p)

```
```

p <- ggplot(Object_Table[Column %in% c(1,2, 3)],
       aes(x = Area, fill = factor(Column))) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count / sum(count)),
                   group = factor(Column),
                   fill = factor(Column)),
               alpha = 0.4,
               position = \identity\,
               bins = 100) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(\1\=\red\, \2\ = \blue\, \3\ = \green\)) +
  ylab(\Proportion\) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(\histo-test2.png\, plot = p, width = 4, height = 4)
plot(p)




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
p <- ggplot(Object_Table[Column %in% c(1,2, 3)],
       aes(x = Area, fill = factor(Column))) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count / sum(count)),
                   group = factor(Column),
                   fill = factor(Column)),
               alpha = 0.4,
               position = \identity\,
               bins = 100) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(\1\=\red\, \2\ = \blue\, \3\ = \green\)) +
  ylab(\Proportion\) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(\histo-test2.png\, plot = p, width = 4, height = 4)
plot(p)

```
```

-->

library(terra)

# A_pts and B_pts are SpatVector
# r is the SpatRaster grid
#r <- rast(A_pts, resolution = c(5,5))   
r <- rast(ext(A_pts), nrows = 1750, ncols = 1750)           #These control how many pixels the density maps have.


rA <- rasterize(A_pts, r, field = 1, fun = \sum\, background = 0)
rB <- rasterize(B_pts, r, field = 1, fun = \sum\, background = 0)

# radius controls smoothing (acts like point size)
radius <- 11      # try 10–40 this controls how wide the density blur is (like point size).
sigma  <- radius / 3

# Create gaussian kernel
x <- -radius:radius
k <- exp(-(x^2)/(2*sigma^2))
kernel <- outer(k, k)
kernel <- kernel / sum(kernel)    # normalize

A_den <- focal(rA, w = kernel, fun = \sum\, na.policy = \omit\, filename = \\)
B_den <- focal(rB, w = kernel, fun = \sum\, na.policy = \omit\, filename = \\)

# Normalize B to 0–1 for thresholding
B_max <- global(B_den, \max\, na.rm = TRUE)[[1]]
B_norm <- B_den / B_max

# Threshold: areas with density > t will mask A
t <- 0.06    # adjust for stronger/weaker masking, this controls how aggressively B punches holes in A, higher number is weaker 0-1

mask_inv <- B_norm < t   # TRUE = keep A, FALSE = hole
mask_inv <- mask_inv * 1 # convert to numeric 0/1

A_masked <- A_den * mask_inv

A_df_r <- as.data.frame(A_masked, xy = TRUE)
colnames(A_df_r) <- c(\x\, \y\, \A\)

B_df_r <- as.data.frame(B_den, xy = TRUE)
colnames(B_df_r) <- c(\x\, \y\, \B\)

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_raster(data = A_df_r, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = A)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = \D\, na.value = NA) +

  geom_raster(data = B_df_r, aes(x = x, y = y, alpha = B), fill = \green\) +
  scale_alpha(range = c(0, 0.5)) +                 #This controls how transparent B appears in the final image.

  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal()
print(p)
ggsave(\density-difference-v2.png\, width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
library(terra)

# A_pts and B_pts are SpatVector
# r is the SpatRaster grid
#r <- rast(A_pts, resolution = c(5,5))   
r <- rast(ext(A_pts), nrows = 1750, ncols = 1750)           #These control how many pixels the density maps have.


rA <- rasterize(A_pts, r, field = 1, fun = \sum\, background = 0)
rB <- rasterize(B_pts, r, field = 1, fun = \sum\, background = 0)

# radius controls smoothing (acts like point size)
radius <- 11      # try 10–40 this controls how wide the density blur is (like point size).
sigma  <- radius / 3

# Create gaussian kernel
x <- -radius:radius
k <- exp(-(x^2)/(2*sigma^2))
kernel <- outer(k, k)
kernel <- kernel / sum(kernel)    # normalize

A_den <- focal(rA, w = kernel, fun = \sum\, na.policy = \omit\, filename = \\)
B_den <- focal(rB, w = kernel, fun = \sum\, na.policy = \omit\, filename = \\)

# Normalize B to 0–1 for thresholding
B_max <- global(B_den, \max\, na.rm = TRUE)[[1]]
B_norm <- B_den / B_max

# Threshold: areas with density > t will mask A
t <- 0.06    # adjust for stronger/weaker masking, this controls how aggressively B punches holes in A, higher number is weaker 0-1

mask_inv <- B_norm < t   # TRUE = keep A, FALSE = hole
mask_inv <- mask_inv * 1 # convert to numeric 0/1

A_masked <- A_den * mask_inv

A_df_r <- as.data.frame(A_masked, xy = TRUE)
colnames(A_df_r) <- c(\x\, \y\, \A\)

B_df_r <- as.data.frame(B_den, xy = TRUE)
colnames(B_df_r) <- c(\x\, \y\, \B\)

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_raster(data = A_df_r, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = A)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = \D\, na.value = NA) +

  geom_raster(data = B_df_r, aes(x = x, y = y, alpha = B), fill = \green\) +
  scale_alpha(range = c(0, 0.5)) +                 #This controls how transparent B appears in the final image.

  coord_fixed() +
  theme_minimal()
print(p)
ggsave(\density-difference-v2.png\, width = 10, height = 10, dpi = 300)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

search()



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

```r
```r
detach(\package:terra\, unload = TRUE, character.only = TRUE)
search()
```

-->

# --- 1. Prepare a clean copy of the data ---
dt_plot <- copy(Object_Table)

# Keep only the conditions you want
dt_plot <- dt_plot[Condition %in% c(
                                    \Cells Only\, 
                                    \Cells Only\n+ PMA\
                                    )]

# Keep only source desired
dt_plot <- dt_plot[Source %in% c(
                                  \Run 9\
                                    )]

dt_plot <- dt_plot %>%
          mutate(color_group = if_else(Thresholded_PC1, \PCA_Threshold\, Condition))

# Ensure Condition is a factor for coloring
dt_plot[, Condition := factor(Condition)]

# Ensure numeric columns are numeric
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, \DAPI.Mean.Intensity\, \MPO.Mean.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 2. Define plotting functions ---

# Diagonal: overlaid proportion histograms
diag_hist <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count / sum(count))),
                   alpha = 0.3, position = \identity\, bins = 50, color = NA) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(\PCA_Threshold\ = \green\, \Cells Only\ = \black\, \Cells Only\n+ PMA\ = \blue\)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    ylab(\Proportion\)
}

# Off-diagonal: scatterplots, colored by condition
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(\PCA_Threshold\ = \green\, \Cells Only\ = \black\, \Cells Only\n+ PMA\ = \blue\)) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# --- 3. Make the pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Condition, fill = Condition),
             upper = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_hist))

# --- Add theme for font sizes ---
p <- p + theme(
  # Axis titles (variable names on edges)
  axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
  
  # Axis tick labels (numbers)
  axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
  
  # Strip text (variable labels at top/side)
  strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = \bold\),
  
  # Legend text
  legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 16)
)

# --- 4. Save and display ---
ggsave(\pairwise-scatterplot4.png\, plot = p, width = 16, height = 16)
#print(p)

-->

```r
```r
# --- 1. Prepare a clean copy of the data ---
dt_plot <- copy(Object_Table)

# Keep only the conditions you want
dt_plot <- dt_plot[Condition %in% c(
                                    \Cells Only\, 
                                    \Cells Only\n+ PMA\
                                    )]

# Keep only source desired
dt_plot <- dt_plot[Source %in% c(
                                  \Run 9\
                                    )]

dt_plot <- dt_plot %>%
          mutate(color_group = if_else(Thresholded_PC1, \PCA_Threshold\, Condition))

# Ensure Condition is a factor for coloring
dt_plot[, Condition := factor(Condition)]

# Ensure numeric columns are numeric
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, \DAPI.Mean.Intensity\, \MPO.Mean.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 2. Define plotting functions ---

# Diagonal: overlaid proportion histograms
diag_hist <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(count / sum(count))),
                   alpha = 0.3, position = \identity\, bins = 50, color = NA) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(\PCA_Threshold\ = \green\, \Cells Only\ = \black\, \Cells Only\n+ PMA\ = \blue\)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    ylab(\Proportion\)
}

# Off-diagonal: scatterplots, colored by condition
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 0.1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(\PCA_Threshold\ = \green\, \Cells Only\ = \black\, \Cells Only\n+ PMA\ = \blue\)) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# --- 3. Make the pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Condition, fill = Condition),
             upper = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_hist))

# --- Add theme for font sizes ---
p <- p + theme(
  # Axis titles (variable names on edges)
  axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
  
  # Axis tick labels (numbers)
  axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
  
  # Strip text (variable labels at top/side)
  strip.text = element_text(size = 16, face = \bold\),
  
  # Legend text
  legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 16)
)

# --- 4. Save and display ---
ggsave(\pairwise-scatterplot4.png\, plot = p, width = 16, height = 16)
#print(p)

```
```

-->

# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- \Run 10\  # Change this

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
                        !is.na(Gated_PC)]

# Create labels and groups
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]
dt_plot[, Group := interaction(Condition_Label, 
                               ifelse(Gated_PC, \Gated\, \Ungated\),
                               sep = \ \)]

# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, 
                     \Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity\, \DAPI.Integrated.Intensity\, \MPO.Integrated.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 3. Define colors ---
group_colors <- c(
  \- PMA Ungated\ = \#1f78b4\,   
  \- PMA Gated\   = \#081d58\,   
  \+ PMA Ungated\ = \#ff7f00\,   
  \+ PMA Gated\   = \red\    
)
 
# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(fill = Group), alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +  # thicker line + fill
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: scatterplots
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Group), alpha = 0.2, size = 0.5) +  # small, semi-transparent points
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = \complete.obs\)
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate(\text\, x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0(\r = \, round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Group, fill = Group),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = \bold\),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(2, \lines\)   # bigger legend samples
)

# --- 7. Save and display ---
ggsave(paste0(\pairwise-scatterplot_\, gsub(\ \, \\, source_to_plot), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 22, height = 20 )
print(p)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- \Run 10\  # Change this

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
                        !is.na(Gated_PC)]

# Create labels and groups
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]
dt_plot[, Group := interaction(Condition_Label, 
                               ifelse(Gated_PC, \Gated\, \Ungated\),
                               sep = \ \)]

# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, 
                     \Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity\, \DAPI.Integrated.Intensity\, \MPO.Integrated.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 3. Define colors ---
group_colors <- c(
  \- PMA Ungated\ = \#1f78b4\,   
  \- PMA Gated\   = \#081d58\,   
  \+ PMA Ungated\ = \#ff7f00\,   
  \+ PMA Gated\   = \red\    
)
 
# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(fill = Group), alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +  # thicker line + fill
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: scatterplots
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Group), alpha = 0.2, size = 0.5) +  # small, semi-transparent points
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = \complete.obs\)
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate(\text\, x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0(\r = \, round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Group, fill = Group),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = \bold\),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(2, \lines\)   # bigger legend samples
)

# --- 7. Save and display ---
ggsave(paste0(\pairwise-scatterplot_\, gsub(\ \, \\, source_to_plot), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 22, height = 20 )
print(p)
```
```

-->

# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- \Run 10\  # Change this

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
                        !is.na(Gated_PC)]

# Create labels and groups
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]
dt_plot[, Group := interaction(Condition_Label, 
                               ifelse(Gated_PC, \Gated\, \Ungated\),
                               sep = \ \)]

# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, 
                     \Bright.Field.Mean.Intensity\, \Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity\, \DAPI.Mean.Intensity\, \DAPI.Integrated.Intensity\, \MPO.Mean.Intensity\, \MPO.Integrated.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 3. Define colors ---
group_colors <- c(
  \- PMA Ungated\ = \#1f78b4\,   
  \- PMA Gated\   = \#081d58\,   
  \+ PMA Ungated\ = \#ff7f00\,   
  \+ PMA Gated\   = \red\    
)
 
# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(fill = Group), alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +  # thicker line + fill
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: density plots
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    stat_density_2d(linewidth = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = \complete.obs\)
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate(\text\, x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0(\r = \, round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Group, fill = Group),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = \bold\),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(2, \lines\)   # bigger legend samples
)

# --- 7. Save and display ---
ggsave(paste0(\pairwise-big-densityplot2_\, gsub(\ \, \\, source_to_plot), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 22, height = 20 )
#print(p)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- \Run 10\  # Change this

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
                        !is.na(Gated_PC)]

# Create labels and groups
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]
dt_plot[, Group := interaction(Condition_Label, 
                               ifelse(Gated_PC, \Gated\, \Ungated\),
                               sep = \ \)]

# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, 
                     \Bright.Field.Mean.Intensity\, \Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity\, \DAPI.Mean.Intensity\, \DAPI.Integrated.Intensity\, \MPO.Mean.Intensity\, \MPO.Integrated.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 3. Define colors ---
group_colors <- c(
  \- PMA Ungated\ = \#1f78b4\,   
  \- PMA Gated\   = \#081d58\,   
  \+ PMA Ungated\ = \#ff7f00\,   
  \+ PMA Gated\   = \red\    
)
 
# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(fill = Group), alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +  # thicker line + fill
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: density plots
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    stat_density_2d(linewidth = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = \complete.obs\)
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate(\text\, x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0(\r = \, round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Group, fill = Group),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = \bold\),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(2, \lines\)   # bigger legend samples
)

# --- 7. Save and display ---
ggsave(paste0(\pairwise-big-densityplot2_\, gsub(\ \, \\, source_to_plot), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 22, height = 20 )
#print(p)
```
```

-->

# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- \Run 10\  # Change this

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
                        !is.na(`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity`)]

# Create labels and groups
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]
dt_plot[, Group := interaction(Condition_Label, 
                               ifelse(`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity`, \Thresholded\, \Unthresholded\),
                               sep = \ \)]


# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, 
                     \Bright.Field.Mean.Intensity\, \Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity\, \DAPI.Mean.Intensity\, \DAPI.Integrated.Intensity\, \MPO.Mean.Intensity\, \MPO.Integrated.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 3. Define colors ---
group_colors <- c(
  \- PMA Unthresholded\ = \#1f78b4\,   
  \- PMA Thresholded\   = \#081d58\,   
  \+ PMA Unthresholded\ = \#ff7f00\,   
  \+ PMA Thresholded\   = \red\    
)

dt_plot[, Group := factor(Group, levels = names(group_colors))] 

# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(fill = Group), alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +  # thicker line + fill
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: density plots
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    stat_density_2d(linewidth = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = \complete.obs\)
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate(\text\, x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0(\r = \, round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Group, fill = Group),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = \bold\),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(2, \lines\)   # bigger legend samples
)

# --- 7. Save and display ---
ggsave(paste0(\pairwise-big-densityplot2_\, gsub(\ \, \\, source_to_plot), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 22, height = 20 )
#print(p)

-->

```r
```r
# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- \Run 10\  # Change this

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
                        !is.na(`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity`)]

# Create labels and groups
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]
dt_plot[, Group := interaction(Condition_Label, 
                               ifelse(`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity`, \Thresholded\, \Unthresholded\),
                               sep = \ \)]


# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, 
                     \Bright.Field.Mean.Intensity\, \Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity\, \DAPI.Mean.Intensity\, \DAPI.Integrated.Intensity\, \MPO.Mean.Intensity\, \MPO.Integrated.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 3. Define colors ---
group_colors <- c(
  \- PMA Unthresholded\ = \#1f78b4\,   
  \- PMA Thresholded\   = \#081d58\,   
  \+ PMA Unthresholded\ = \#ff7f00\,   
  \+ PMA Thresholded\   = \red\    
)

dt_plot[, Group := factor(Group, levels = names(group_colors))] 

# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(fill = Group), alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +  # thicker line + fill
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: density plots
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    stat_density_2d(linewidth = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = group_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = \complete.obs\)
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate(\text\, x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0(\r = \, round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Group, fill = Group),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = \bold\),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(2, \lines\)   # bigger legend samples
)

# --- 7. Save and display ---
ggsave(paste0(\pairwise-big-densityplot2_\, gsub(\ \, \\, source_to_plot), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 22, height = 20 )
#print(p)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- \Run 10\

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
                        !is.na(`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity`)]

# Create labels
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]

```r
# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- \Run 10\

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
                        !is.na(`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity`)]

# Create labels
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]
```
```

# Get thresholded cells subset
dt_threshold <- dt_plot[`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity` == TRUE]

# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, 
              #\Bright.Field.Mean.Intensity\, \Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity\, 
              #\DAPI.Mean.Intensity\, \DAPI.Integrated.Intensity\, 
              \MPO.Mean.Intensity\, \MPO.Integrated.Intensity\,
              \CitH3.Mean.Intensity\, \CitH3.Integrated.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

```r
```r
# Get thresholded cells subset
dt_threshold <- dt_plot[`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity` == TRUE]

# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, 
              #\Bright.Field.Mean.Intensity\, \Bright.Field.Integrated.Intensity\, 
              #\DAPI.Mean.Intensity\, \DAPI.Integrated.Intensity\, 
              \MPO.Mean.Intensity\, \MPO.Integrated.Intensity\,
              \CitH3.Mean.Intensity\, \CitH3.Integrated.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

169614: 79.28000 5946 1.626667 122 169615: 81.05303 10699 3.280303 433 169616: 83.77778 3016 3.388889 122 169617: 61.32076 3250 5.679245 301 169618: 64.84127 4085 4.841270 305 MPO.Mean.Intensity MPO.Integrated.Intensity CitH3.Mean.Intensity CitH3.Integrated.Intensity Mask Source Condition 1: 19.925373 1335 1.611940 108 MPO Run 10 Cells Only 2: 72.746475 10330 3.809859 541 MPO Run 10 Cells Only 3: 30.766666 1846 6.216667 373 MPO Run 10 Cells Only 4: 29.236111 2105 1.986111 143 MPO Run 10 Cells Only 5: 19.066668 1144 4.583333 275 MPO Run 10 Cells Only —
169614: 13.533334 1015 1.520000 114 MPO Run 10 Cells Only + PMA 169615: 20.113636 2655 1.856061 245 MPO Run 10 Cells Only + PMA 169616: 12.750000 459 2.111111 76 MPO Run 10 Cells Only + PMA 169617: 10.264151 544 1.603774 85 MPO Run 10 Cells Only + PMA 169618: 8.619047 543 2.349206 148 MPO Run 10 Cells Only + PMA row.id 10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity Condition_Label 1: 2000 FALSE - PMA 2: 2001 FALSE - PMA 3: 2002 FALSE - PMA 4: 2003 FALSE - PMA 5: 2004 FALSE - PMA —
169614: 1515281 FALSE + PMA 169615: 1515282 FALSE + PMA 169616: 1515283 FALSE + PMA 169617: 1515284 FALSE + PMA 169618: 1515285 FALSE + PMA

# --- 3. Define colors ---
condition_colors <- c(\- PMA\ = \royalblue\, \+ PMA\ = \goldenrod\)

# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(color = Condition_Label), linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: scatter with threshold density overlay
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  # Get the column names from mapping
  x_col <- as.character(mapping$x)[2]
  y_col <- as.character(mapping$y)[2]
  
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    stat_density_2d(aes(color = Condition_Label), linewidth = 0.6) +
    stat_density_2d(data = dt_threshold, 
                    aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = .data[[y_col]]),
                    color = \red\, 
                    linewidth = 1.0, 
                    alpha = 0.8,
                    bins = 5,
                    inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = \complete.obs\)
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate(\text\, x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0(\r = \, round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Condition_Label),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = \bold\),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(2, \lines\)
)

# --- 7. Save and display ---
ggsave(paste0(\pairwise-densityplot_threshold_\, gsub(\ \, \\, source_to_plot), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 22, height = 20)
#print(p)

```r
```r
# --- 3. Define colors ---
condition_colors <- c(\- PMA\ = \royalblue\, \+ PMA\ = \goldenrod\)

# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(color = Condition_Label), linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: scatter with threshold density overlay
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  # Get the column names from mapping
  x_col <- as.character(mapping$x)[2]
  y_col <- as.character(mapping$y)[2]
  
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    stat_density_2d(aes(color = Condition_Label), linewidth = 0.6) +
    stat_density_2d(data = dt_threshold, 
                    aes(x = .data[[x_col]], y = .data[[y_col]]),
                    color = \red\, 
                    linewidth = 1.0, 
                    alpha = 0.8,
                    bins = 5,
                    inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = \complete.obs\)
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate(\text\, x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0(\r = \, round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Condition_Label),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = \bold\),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(2, \lines\)
)

# --- 7. Save and display ---
ggsave(paste0(\pairwise-densityplot_threshold_\, gsub(\ \, \\, source_to_plot), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 22, height = 20)
#print(p)
```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->

<!-- rnb-text-end -->

IHVuaXQoMiwgXFxsaW5lc1xcKVxuKVxuXG4jIC0tLSA3LiBTYXZlIGFuZCBkaXNwbGF5IC0tLVxuZ2dzYXZlKHBhc3RlMChcXHBhaXJ3aXNlLWRlbnNpdHlwbG90X1xcLCBnc3ViKFxcIFxcLCBcXFxcLCBzb3VyY2VfdG9fcGxvdCksIFxcLnBuZ1xcKSwgXG4gICAgICAgcGxvdCA9IHAsIHdpZHRoID0gMjIsIGhlaWdodCA9IDIwKVxucHJpbnQocClcbmBgYFxuXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtZW5kIC0tPlxuIn0= -->

# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- \Run 10\

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
                        !is.na(`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity`)]

# Create labels
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]

# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, 
              \MPO.Mean.Intensity\, \MPO.Integrated.Intensity\,
              \CitH3.Mean.Intensity\, \CitH3.Integrated.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 3. Define colors ---
condition_colors <- c(\- PMA\ = \royalblue\, \+ PMA\ = \goldenrod\)

# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(color = Condition_Label), linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: scatter WITHOUT threshold density overlay
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    stat_density_2d(aes(color = Condition_Label), linewidth = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = \complete.obs\)
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate(\text\, x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0(\r = \, round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Condition_Label),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = \bold\),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(2, \lines\)
)

# --- 7. Save and display ---
ggsave(paste0(\pairwise-densityplot_\, gsub(\ \, \\, source_to_plot), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 22, height = 20)
print(p)



<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
# --- 1. Specify source to plot ---
source_to_plot <- \Run 10\

# --- 2. Prepare data ---
dt_plot <- Object_Table[Source == source_to_plot & 
                        Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
                        !is.na(`10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity`)]

# Create labels
dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]

# Ensure numeric columns
num_cols <- c(\Area\, \Form.Factor\, \Smoothness\, \Aspect.Ratio\, 
              \MPO.Mean.Intensity\, \MPO.Integrated.Intensity\,
              \CitH3.Mean.Intensity\, \CitH3.Integrated.Intensity\)
dt_plot[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, as.numeric), .SDcols = num_cols]

# --- 3. Define colors ---
condition_colors <- c(\- PMA\ = \royalblue\, \+ PMA\ = \goldenrod\)

# --- 4. Define plotting functions ---
# Diagonal: density plots
diag_density <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    geom_density(aes(color = Condition_Label), linewidth = 0.8, alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Lower: scatter WITHOUT threshold density overlay
scatter_col <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  ggplot(data = data, mapping = mapping) +
    stat_density_2d(aes(color = Condition_Label), linewidth = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = condition_colors) +
    theme_minimal()
}

# Upper: correlation text
cor_fun <- function(data, mapping, ...) {
  x <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$x)
  y <- eval_data_col(data, mapping$y)
  
  corr <- cor(x, y, use = \complete.obs\)
  
  ggplot() +
    annotate(\text\, x = 0.5, y = 0.5, 
             label = paste0(\r = \, round(corr, 2)),
             size = 9) +
    theme_void()
}

# --- 5. Create pairwise plot ---
p <- ggpairs(dt_plot,
             columns = num_cols,
             mapping = aes(color = Condition_Label),
             upper = list(continuous = cor_fun),
             lower = list(continuous = scatter_col),
             diag = list(continuous = diag_density),
             legend = 1)

# --- 6. Apply theme ---
p <- p + theme(
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = \bold\),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  legend.key.size = unit(2, \lines\)
)

# --- 7. Save and display ---
ggsave(paste0(\pairwise-densityplot_\, gsub(\ \, \\, source_to_plot), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 22, height = 20)
print(p)
```
```

-->

plot_density_with_threshold <- function(
  dt,
  x_var,
  y_var,
  source_to_plot
  #threshold_col = \10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity\
  #condition_colors = c(\- PMA\ = \royalblue\, \+ PMA\ = \goldenrod\)
) {
  
  # Subset data
  dt_plot <- dt[
    Source == source_to_plot &
      Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
      !is.na(get(x_var)) & !is.na(get(y_var))
  ]
  
  # Condition labels
  dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]
  
  # Thresholded subset
  #dt_threshold <- dt_plot[get(threshold_col) == TRUE]
  
  # Plot
  ggplot(dt_plot, aes(x = get(x_var), y = get(y_var))) +
    
    # Condition-colored density contours
    stat_density_2d(aes(color = Condition_Label),
                    linewidth = 0.6) +
    
    # Red density contours for thresholded cells
    #stat_density_2d(data = dt_threshold, aes(x = get(x_var), y = get(y_var), color = \Thresholded\), linewidth = 1, bins = 5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    
   scale_color_manual(
  breaks = c(\- PMA\, \+ PMA\, \Thresholded\),
  values = c(
    #\Thresholded\ = \red\,
    \- PMA\ = \royalblue\,
    \+ PMA\ = \goldenrod\
    
  )
) +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
    ) +
    
    labs(
      title = paste0(
        gsub(\\\.\, \ \, x_var), \ vs \,
        gsub(\\\.\, \ \, y_var), \ — \,
        source_to_plot
      ),
      x = gsub(\\\.\, \ \, x_var),
      y = gsub(\\\.\, \ \, y_var)
    )
}




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

-->

```r
```r
plot_density_with_threshold <- function(
  dt,
  x_var,
  y_var,
  source_to_plot
  #threshold_col = \10-Fold.Thresholded.CitH3.Mean.Intensity\
  #condition_colors = c(\- PMA\ = \royalblue\, \+ PMA\ = \goldenrod\)
) {
  
  # Subset data
  dt_plot <- dt[
    Source == source_to_plot &
      Condition %in% c(\Cells Only\, \Cells Only + PMA\) &
      !is.na(get(x_var)) & !is.na(get(y_var))
  ]
  
  # Condition labels
  dt_plot[, Condition_Label := ifelse(Condition == \Cells Only\, \- PMA\, \+ PMA\)]
  
  # Thresholded subset
  #dt_threshold <- dt_plot[get(threshold_col) == TRUE]
  
  # Plot
  ggplot(dt_plot, aes(x = get(x_var), y = get(y_var))) +
    
    # Condition-colored density contours
    stat_density_2d(aes(color = Condition_Label),
                    linewidth = 0.6) +
    
    # Red density contours for thresholded cells
    #stat_density_2d(data = dt_threshold, aes(x = get(x_var), y = get(y_var), color = \Thresholded\), linewidth = 1, bins = 5, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    
   scale_color_manual(
  breaks = c(\- PMA\, \+ PMA\, \Thresholded\),
  values = c(
    #\Thresholded\ = \red\,
    \- PMA\ = \royalblue\,
    \+ PMA\ = \goldenrod\
    
  )
) +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.title = element_blank(),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
    ) +
    
    labs(
      title = paste0(
        gsub(\\\.\, \ \, x_var), \ vs \,
        gsub(\\\.\, \ \, y_var), \ — \,
        source_to_plot
      ),
      x = gsub(\\\.\, \ \, x_var),
      y = gsub(\\\.\, \ \, y_var)
    )
}

```
```

<!-- rnb-source-end -->


<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiXG48IS0tIHJuYi1zb3VyY2UtYmVnaW4gZXlKa1lYUmhJam9pWUdCZ2NseHVlRjkySUR3dElGd2lUVkJQTGsxbFlXNHVTVzUwWlc1emFYUjVYQ0pjYm5sZmRpQThMU0JjSWtOcGRFZ3pMazFsWVc0dVNXNTBaVzV6YVhSNVhDSmNibk5mZEY5d0lEd3RJRndpVW5WdUlERXdYQ0pjYmx4dVhHNXdJRHd0SUhCc2IzUmZaR1Z1YzJsMGVWOTNhWFJvWDNSb2NtVnphRzlzWkNoY2JpQWdaSFFnUFNCUFltcGxZM1JmVkdGaWJHVXNYRzRnSUhoZmRtRnlJRDBnZUY5MkxGeHVJQ0I1WDNaaGNpQTlJSGxmZGl4Y2JpQWdjMjkxY21ObFgzUnZYM0JzYjNRZ1BTQnpYM1JmY0Z4dUtWeHVYRzV3Y21sdWRDaHdLVnh1WjJkellYWmxLSEJoYzNSbE1DaGNJbVJsYm5OcGRIbHdiRzkwWDF3aUxDQjRYM1lzSUhsZmRpd2daM04xWWloY0lpQmNJaXdnWENKY0lpd2djMTkwWDNBcExDQmNJaTV3Ym1kY0lpa3NJRnh1SUNBZ0lDQWdJSEJzYjNRZ1BTQndMQ0IzYVdSMGFDQTlJRGdzSUdobGFXZG9kQ0E5SURjcFhHNWdZR0FpZlE9PSAtLT5cblxuYGBgclxueF92IDwtIFxcTVBPLk1lYW4uSW50ZW5zaXR5XFxcbnlfdiA8LSBcXENpdEgzLk1lYW4uSW50ZW5zaXR5XFxcbnNfdF9wIDwtIFxcUnVuIDEwXFxcblxuXG5wIDwtIHBsb3RfZGVuc2l0eV93aXRoX3RocmVzaG9sZChcbiAgZHQgPSBPYmplY3RfVGFibGUsXG4gIHhfdmFyID0geF92LFxuICB5X3ZhciA9IHlfdixcbiAgc291cmNlX3RvX3Bsb3QgPSBzX3RfcFxuKVxuXG5wcmludChwKVxuZ2dzYXZlKHBhc3RlMChcXGRlbnNpdHlwbG90X1xcLCB4X3YsIHlfdiwgZ3N1YihcXCBcXCwgXFxcXCwgc190X3ApLCBcXC5wbmdcXCksIFxuICAgICAgIHBsb3QgPSBwLCB3aWR0aCA9IDgsIGhlaWdodCA9IDcpXG5gYGBcblxuPCEtLSBybmItc291cmNlLWVuZCAtLT5cbiJ9 -->

x_v <- \MPO.Mean.Intensity\
y_v <- \CitH3.Mean.Intensity\
s_t_p <- \Run 10\


p <- plot_density_with_threshold(
  dt = Object_Table,
  x_var = x_v,
  y_var = y_v,
  source_to_plot = s_t_p
)

print(p)
ggsave(paste0(\densityplot_\, x_v, y_v, gsub(\ \, \\, s_t_p), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 7)

````

```r
x_v <- \MPO.Mean.Intensity\
y_v <- \CitH3.Mean.Intensity\
s_t_p <- \Run 10\


p <- plot_density_with_threshold(
  dt = Object_Table,
  x_var = x_v,
  y_var = y_v,
  source_to_plot = s_t_p
)

print(p)
ggsave(paste0(\densityplot_\, x_v, y_v, gsub(\ \, \\, s_t_p), \.png\), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 7)
